items.title: M5 — Globular Cluster
items.equipment: Sky watcher 72ed + Canon T5 + Astroberry + Sky watcher GTI
items.notes: First star cluster photo, also the moon was almost at peak brightness.

items.title: M81 & M82 — Bodes & Cigar Galaxies
items.alt: M81 and M82, Bodes Galaxy and the Cigar Galaxy photographed together
items.target: M81 & M82 — interacting pair in Ursa Major
items.equipment: Sky watcher 72ed + Canon T5 + Astroberry + Sky watcher GTI
items.notes: First picture ever on my telescope. Dope. But I do not remember how much time was the total integration so it is not 100% correct.

items.title: Full Moon
items.alt: A picture of a full moon
items.equipment: Sky watcher 72ed + Canon T5 + Astroberry + Sky watcher GTI
items.notes: Just do not ask me why 0.0005.. I thought it was too bright. 😂
